shadows.name: card-rest
shadows.purpose: Default panel lift on glass cards.

shadows.name: signal-glow
shadows.purpose: Live status dots and ready indicators.

motion.name: ease-control
motion.purpose: Default state transitions on buttons, borders, and status.

motion.name: pulse-live
motion.purpose: Recording/status dot pulse; suppress under prefers-reduced-motion.

motion.name: cta-lift
motion.purpose: Generate button hover lift (−2px) and glow.

components.name: Primary Generate
components.description: Full-width primary CTA — 生成影片 — the only loud action.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { width: 100%; padding: 15px 20px; border-radius: 12px; border: none; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0d9488 0%, #0891b2 55%, #0284c7 100%); color: #fff; font-family: Inter, 'Noto Sans TC', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.02em; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(8, 145, 178, 0.4), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15); transition: opacity 0.2s, transform 0.15s, box-shadow 0.25s, filter 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover:not(:disabled) { transform: translateY(-2px); filter: brightness(1.06); box-shadow: 0 10px 32px rgba(8, 145, 178, 0.5), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(20, 184, 166, 0.7); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.55; cursor: not-allowed; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); box-shadow: none; filter: none; }

components.name: Segment Control
components.description: Format / orientation segment chip; active state uses signal teal.
components.css: .ds-seg { display: flex; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .ds-seg-btn { padding: 8px 18px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12); background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04); color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.58); font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 700; font-family: Inter, 'Noto Sans TC', system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.04em; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.15s, color 0.15s, background 0.15s; } .ds-seg-btn:hover { border-color: rgba(20, 184, 166, 0.45); color: #fff; background: rgba(20, 184, 166, 0.08); } .ds-seg-btn-active { border-color: #14b8a6 !important; background: rgba(20, 184, 166, 0.16) !important; color: #5eead4 !important; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(20, 184, 166, 0.15); } .ds-seg-btn:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(20, 184, 166, 0.7); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Glass Card
components.description: Workflow panel card with hairline border and light lift.
components.html:
封面圖片

1

Upload a still to begin.
components.css: .ds-card { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.045); backdrop-filter: blur(20px); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.09); border-radius: 16px; padding: 14px 16px; box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25); color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.92); font-family: Inter, 'Noto Sans TC', system-ui, sans-serif; transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-card:hover { border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.14); } .ds-card-h { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 10px; } .ds-label { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 700; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.42); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.12em; margin: 0; } .ds-label::before { content: ''; width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #14b8a6, #38bdf8); box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(20, 184, 166, 0.5); } .ds-step { width: 22px; height: 22px; border-radius: 7px; display: grid; place-items: center; font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 800; color: #5eead4; background: rgba(20, 184, 166, 0.12); border: 1px solid rgba(20, 184, 166, 0.28); } .ds-card-body { margin: 0; font-size: 0.875rem; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.62); line-height: 1.6; }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: Dark translucent field for script and filename.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; font-family: Inter, 'Noto Sans TC', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-field-label { font-size: 0.85rem; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.68); } .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12); background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04); color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.92); font: inherit; font-size: 0.875rem; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.35); } .ds-input:hover { border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: rgba(20, 184, 166, 0.55); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(20, 184, 166, 0.2); }

components.name: Status Chip
components.description: Header ready/recording pill with live signal dot.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 5px 11px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 600; font-family: Inter, 'Noto Sans TC', system-ui, sans-serif; color: #5eead4; background: rgba(20, 184, 166, 0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(20, 184, 166, 0.25); } .ds-chip-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: #14b8a6; box-shadow: 0 0 6px #14b8a6; }

components.name: Image Dropzone
components.description: Cover image drop target; teal wash when active.
components.html: 拖放圖片或點擊選擇 · PNG / JPG
components.css: .ds-drop { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; min-height: 120px; padding: 12px 16px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px dashed rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.16); background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25); color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.68); font-family: Inter, 'Noto Sans TC', system-ui, sans-serif; text-align: center; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.2s, background 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-drop strong { font-size: 0.88rem; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.92); font-weight: 600; } .ds-drop span { font-size: 0.72rem; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.42); } .ds-drop:hover, .ds-drop:focus-visible { border-color: rgba(20, 184, 166, 0.45); background: rgba(20, 184, 166, 0.07); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(20, 184, 166, 0.08); outline: none; }

components.name: App Header
components.description: Sticky glass header — logo mark, bilingual title, status chip.
components.html:
Image Voice Video
圖片 · 語音 · 多語字幕影片
就緒
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; height: 64px; padding: 0 28px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.09); background: rgba(12, 18, 32, 0.72); backdrop-filter: blur(18px) saturate(1.4); font-family: Inter, 'Noto Sans TC', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-brand { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; min-width: 0; } .ds-nav-mark { width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 11px; background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(20, 184, 166, 0.25), rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.15)); border: 1px solid rgba(20, 184, 166, 0.35); box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(20, 184, 166, 0.15); flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-nav-title { font-weight: 800; font-size: 1.02rem; letter-spacing: -0.03em; line-height: 1.2; color: #5eead4; } .ds-nav-sub { font-size: 0.68rem; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.42); font-weight: 500; } .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 5px 11px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 600; color: #5eead4; background: rgba(20, 184, 166, 0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(20, 184, 166, 0.25); } .ds-chip-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: #14b8a6; box-shadow: 0 0 6px #14b8a6; }

components.name: Status Bar
components.description: Pipeline status line under the preview; recording state uses teal.
components.css: .ds-status { padding: 12px 16px; border-radius: 12px; background: rgba(12, 18, 32, 0.92); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.09); font-size: 0.875rem; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.42); min-height: 48px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-family: Inter, 'Noto Sans TC', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-status-live { border-color: rgba(20, 184, 166, 0.4); color: #5eead4; background: rgba(20, 184, 166, 0.08); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(20, 184, 166, 0.08), 0 0 24px rgba(20, 184, 166, 0.1); } .ds-status-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: #14b8a6; box-shadow: 0 0 8px #14b8a6; flex-shrink: 0; }

narrative.overview:
This is a dark production desk for content creators who need a narrated clip from a still—fast. Surfaces sit on a near-black void (#070b14) with translucent glass panels; teal signal lights mark readiness and selection; the live canvas is the stage. Density is moderate on the control rail and generous around the preview: the interface never competes with the frame being authored.

Personality is fast, clear, capable (from PRODUCT.md). Type is a single technical sans stack (Inter + Noto Sans TC) for bilingual zh-TW / Latin UI. Motion stays responsive—status pulses, hover lifts on the primary CTA—not scroll choreography. The system explicitly rejects generic SaaS dashboards: no sidebar nav forests, no metric cards, no enterprise gray chrome. It is a focused creator workspace with one continuous flow.
keyCharacteristics: Night void base with teal/sky signal accents (restrained color strategy: accent ≤ ~10% of surface)
Preview-first split: compact left controls, sticky right stage
Glass header and card surfaces via blur + hairline borders
One loud primary action: 生成影片
Bilingual-ready type; short zh-TW status copy

rules.name: The Signal Teal Rule
rules.body: Teal marks state (ready, selected, recording)—not large fills. If a full panel is teal, the system has failed.

rules.name: The Night Void Rule
rules.body: Body background stays near-black (#070b14 or tonal siblings). No cream/sand paper, no purple AI-gradient body.

rules.name: The One Stack Rule
rules.body: Do not introduce a second display family for “premium.” Bilingual clarity beats decorative pairing.

rules.name: The Label Budget Rule
rules.body: Uppercase tracked labels are reserved for the main workflow steps. Do not stamp a kicker above every subsection.

rules.name: The No Ghost-Card Rule
rules.body: Never pair a 1px border with a soft wide drop shadow (blur ≥ 16px) on the same control for decoration.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Controls Rule
rules.body: Segment buttons and list rows stay flat; elevation appears on hover/active border and tint, not floating shadows.

dos: Do keep one continuous workspace: image → script → tracks → settings → preview → generate.
Do treat the preview as source of truth for framing, subtitles, and orientation.
Do use Signal Teal for state and primary interactive affordances only.
Do maintain readable ink: prefer --text / ink-primary for body; bump contrast rather than “elegant gray.”
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion for pulses and entrance motion.
Do keep the generate button the single dominant CTA on the screen.
donts: Don't look like a generic SaaS dashboard—no sidebar navigation forests, metric cards, or enterprise gray chrome (PRODUCT.md anti-reference).
Don't use gradient text on product chrome (logo wordmark is the only existing exception; do not expand the pattern).
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left/border-right > 1px) as accent on cards or alerts.
Don't add decorative CSS grid overlays or diagonal stripe backgrounds as “tech texture.”
Don't stack identical icon+title+text marketing cards; this is a tool, not a landing.
Don't put an uppercase tracked eyebrow on every subsection—workflow step labels only.
Don't ship border-radius ≥ 32px on cards or panels; stay on the 8 / 12 / 16 / 22 scale.
Don't pair 1px border + soft wide shadow (blur ≥ 16px) on the same decorative card (ghost-card ban).
